changelog: v4.2 — Lever-audit simplification. Cleared two dead levers: min_position_pct (a no-op) and the correlation-dedup (menu tau→1.0; redundant with the tail screen, which does the menu screening). Full-cycle vs v4.1: CAGR 13.78→13.87%, worst-12mo −6.6→−6.4%, MaxDD −17.2→−16.4%, Martin 3.00→3.09 — a small improvement on every axis. cluster_cap and vol_suppressor kept (the latter holds ~1pp of 2008 tail). See docs/engineering/lever-audit-2026-07.md.
